expectations.text: Correctly identifies root cause: blueprint drawn in screen/pixel space rather than inside the same ctx.setTransform() world-space context as walls
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states blueprint drawn outside setTransform context, referencing the skill's own diagnostic note

expectations.text: Corrected zoomAtPoint function shown with cursor-pivot math (panOffset adjusted so cursor world point stays fixed)
expectations.evidence: Converts cursor to world coords before zoom, then recomputes panOffset to keep world point fixed — correct pivot math

expectations.text: Blueprint rendered AFTER ctx.setTransform() is applied so it moves with the world coordinate system
expectations.evidence: renderCanvas calls ctx.setTransform() first, then draws blueprint inside that context

expectations.text: ctx.save() and ctx.restore() wrap the blueprint draw call; ctx.globalAlpha set and then reset
expectations.evidence: ctx.save() / ctx.restore() present; ctx.globalAlpha = blueprint.opacity then reset to 1.0 explicitly

expectations.text: Explanation clearly describes that drawing in screen space vs. world space is the mismatch causing drift
expectations.evidence: Before/after table and prose explanation both articulate the screen-space vs world-space mismatch clearly
